en.extract:
The white-chinned myzomela (Myzomela albigula) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae.
It is found in the Louisiade Archipelago.

The '''white-chinned myzomela''' ('''''Myzomela albigula''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]].
It is found in the [[Louisiade Archipelago]].
